_meta.source: Oregon Residential Specialty Code (ORSC) + local county amendments

deckCodes.footingDepthMin: 12 in below frost line (typically 18-24 in total in valley)
deckCodes.ledgerAttachment: Lag screws + flashing required; nails not permitted for ledger.

fenceHeights.over6ft: Requires building permit + wind load calc in most counties.

retainingWalls.permitTrigger: Over 4 ft tall measured from bottom of footing, or supporting a surcharge (driveway/slope).

footingRequirements.deckPost: Min 10-12 in diameter pier, 18-24 in deep, below frost line.

hoaNote: Many subdivisions (especially newer in Albany/Corvallis) require HOA architectural review before fence/deck color, height, or placement.
